Title: Configurable Product PDP Renders Configuration Widget Correctly
Section: Configurable Products > PDP Rendering
Preconditions: Storefront accessible at {{FRONT_URL}}. Product Bike with options (SKU: CVQ-54616437) exists at /products-with-options/configurations/@td(CFG_BIKE.slug)
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/products-with-options/configurations/@td(CFG_BIKE.slug); [WAIT] Wait for Configure text to appear; [ASSERT] Observe product name at top of page; [ASSERT] Observe base product price; [ASSERT] Observe the Configure the parameters widget; [ASSERT] Observe accordion section label Select one; [ASSERT] Observe subtitle Personalize your selection further (optional); [ASSERT] Observe accordion is open (expanded) by default; [ASSERT] Verify 5 radio options visible: Rear wheel 26 double-wall rim motorized; 200CC 250CC 4-Stroke Engine Motor; Seat; Pedals; None; [ASSERT] Verify None is selected by default; [ASSERT] Verify dedicated Add to cart button is visible (no quantity stepper for configurable products); [ASSERT] Verify no CountInCart badge shown in fresh state (no lineItemId in URL)
Assertions: [DOM] Product name Bike with options visible in h1 or product title element; [DOM] Base price $350.00 displayed in price element; [DOM] Configure the parameters widget header visible; [DOM] Accordion label reads Select one with subtitle Personalize your selection further (optional); [DOM] All 5 radio options present with None selected by default; [STATE] Dedicated Add to cart button visible (not a quantity stepper — configurable products use a single action button per VCST-3902); [STATE] No CountInCart badge displayed when no lineItemId query param in URL; [DOM] In stock badge visible
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors on page load; [NETWORK] Product detail GraphQL query returns 200 with configurable sections in response
Failure_Signals: Quantity stepper shown instead of dedicated button; CountInCart badge visible without lineItemId; price element missing or showing wrong value; widget not rendered; fewer than 5 radio options visible; None not pre-selected

Title: Selecting Radio Option Updates Total Price Immediately
Section: Configurable Products > Option Selection
Preconditions: Storefront accessible. Bike with options PDP loaded. None selected by default. Base price $350.00 visible.
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to Bike with options PDP; [WAIT] Wait for Configure widget; [ASSERT] Note base price $350.00 (None selected); [ACT] Click radio button for Seat option; [ASSERT] Observe total price update to $365.00; [ACT] Click radio button for Pedals option; [ASSERT] Observe total price update to $364.00; [ACT] Click radio button for 200CC 250CC 4-Stroke Engine Motor option; [ASSERT] Observe total price update to $575.00; [ACT] Click radio button for Rear wheel 26 double-wall rim motorized option; [ASSERT] Observe total price update to $526.00; [ACT] Click None radio button; [ASSERT] Observe total price returns to $350.00
Assertions: [MATH] Seat total=$365.00 ($350 base + $15 x1); [MATH] Pedals total=$364.00 ($350 base + $14 x1); [MATH] Engine total=$575.00 ($350 base + $225 x1); [MATH] Rear wheel total=$526.00 ($350 base + $88 x2=$176); [MATH] None total=$350.00; [STATE] Only one radio selectable at a time; [STATE] Price updates are immediate with no page reload; [DOM] Accordion subtitle updates to show selected option name
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] No JavaScript errors on option selection; [NETWORK] No full page reload triggered on radio click
Failure_Signals: Price does not update on radio click; multiple radios appear selected simultaneously; price update requires page reload; wrong total for any option (especially Rear wheel which is $88 x2 not x1)

Title: Price Calculation Accuracy for All Five Option Combinations

Assertions: [MATH] None: $350.00; [MATH] Seat: $365.00 ($350+$15 x1); [MATH] Pedals: $364.00 ($350+$14 x1); [MATH] Engine: $575.00 ($350+$225 x1); [MATH] Rear wheel: $526.00 ($350+$88 x2); [MATH] None again: $350.00; [STATE] All prices correct on second cycle (no stale state)

Title: Update Cart Button Fires changeCartConfiguredItem (Not addItem)
Section: Configurable Products > VCST-3902 > Update Flow
Preconditions: User authenticated. Configured product in cart. PDP loaded with lineItemId in URL. Button shows Update cart.
Steps: [NAV] Sign in; add configured product (Seat) to cart; [ASSERT] Button shows Update cart; lineItemId in URL; [ACT] Change selection from Seat to Engine option; [WAIT] Price updates to $575.00; [ACT] Click Update cart button; [WAIT] Mutation completes; [ASSERT] Observe success — button remains as Update cart; [ASSERT] lineItemId unchanged in URL; [NAV] Navigate to cart; [ASSERT] Line item shows Engine configuration (not Seat); [ASSERT] Price=$575.00; [ASSERT] Only one line item for this product (no duplicate)
Assertions: [STATE] Update cart fires changeCartConfiguredItem mutation (not addItem); [STATE] lineItemId preserved in URL after update; [DOM] Button stays as Update cart after successful update; [MATH] Cart price updated to $575.00 reflecting Engine option; [STATE] No duplicate line item — existing item updated in-place; [STATE] Configuration marked as saved (dirty tracking reset via markConfigurationAsSaved)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [NETWORK] changeCartConfiguredItem mutation fires (verify in network tab — not addItem); [API] changeCartConfiguredItem returns 200 with updated configurationItems[]; [CONSOLE] No JS errors
Failure_Signals: addItem firing instead of changeCartConfiguredItem (creating duplicate); lineItemId changing after update; button reverting to Add to cart; old configuration (Seat) still shown in cart; duplicate line item created

Title: Save Changes Modal When Navigating Away from Unsaved Edit
Section: Configurable Products > VCST-3902 > Dirty State Guard
Preconditions: User authenticated. Configured product in cart. PDP loaded with lineItemId in URL (edit-from-cart context). Configuration has been modified but not saved.
Steps: [NAV] Sign in; add configured product (Seat) to cart; [ASSERT] Button shows Update cart; lineItemId in URL; [ACT] Change selection to Engine (do NOT click Update cart); [ASSERT] Configuration is now dirty (changed but unsaved); [ACT] Attempt to navigate away (click browser back or navigate to another page); [WAIT] Save Changes modal should appear; [ASSERT] Modal asks whether to save or discard changes; [ACT] Click Save in modal; [WAIT] changeCartConfiguredItem fires; [NAV] Navigation completes after save; [NAV] Navigate to cart; [ASSERT] Line item shows Engine configuration (saved via modal)
Assertions: [DOM] Save Changes modal appears when navigating away with unsaved configuration changes in edit context (lineItemId present); [STATE] Modal does NOT appear if no changes were made; [STATE] Clicking Save in modal triggers changeCartConfiguredItem and then proceeds with navigation; [STATE] Clicking Discard proceeds with navigation without saving; [DOM] Cart reflects saved configuration if Save was chosen
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] No JS errors on modal display or save action; [NETWORK] changeCartConfiguredItem fires on modal Save; [NETWORK] No mutation fires on modal Discard
Failure_Signals: No modal appearing on navigation with unsaved changes; modal appearing when no changes made; Save in modal not actually saving; navigation blocked permanently after modal

Title: Cart Quantity Stepper Hidden on PDP — Only Available in Cart for Configurable Products
Section: Configurable Products > VCST-3902 > Stepper Removal
Preconditions: Storefront accessible. Bike with options PDP loaded.
Steps: [NAV] Navigate to Bike with options PDP; [WAIT] Configure widget visible; [ASSERT] Verify NO QuantityControl stepper element exists on PDP for the configurable product (no +/- buttons; no quantity input field); [ASSERT] Verify only a single Add to cart button is present; [ACT] Select Seat option; click Add to cart; [NAV] Navigate to cart; [ASSERT] Verify cart DOES show quantity stepper (QuantityControl) for the configured line item; [ACT] Increase qty to 2 using cart stepper; [ASSERT] qty=2; line total recalculates; [ACT] Decrease qty to 1; [ASSERT] qty=1; line total recalculates
Assertions: [DOM] PDP for configurable product does NOT render QuantityControl (no stepper; no +/- buttons); [DOM] Only dedicated VcButton (Add to cart / Update cart) present on PDP; [DOM] Cart page DOES render QuantityControl for configured line items; [MATH] Cart stepper correctly updates quantity and recalculates line total; [STATE] This separation is by design per VCST-3902 — quantity for configurable products managed in cart only
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] No JS errors; [NETWORK] No unexpected mutations
Failure_Signals: QuantityControl stepper visible on PDP for configurable product; cart stepper missing for configured line item; quantity changes not recalculating in cart
